examples: There is a tendency to compare yourself unfavorably with other people.
The halls are decorated with posters comparing Mr. Obama unfavorably with George W. Bush.
Thirty-nine percent (39%) of all votershave a favorable opinion of Paul, while 30% view him unfavorably.
The radio-show host also compared Clinton unfavorably to first lady Laura Bush during the rally.
Among Republicans, Mr. Ryan was viewed favorably by 12-1, but Democrats viewed him unfavorably by 5-1.
